description: Expand the Urban Electronics business by creating a new European storefront and assigning products to it. Create an active, non-default store named 'Urban Electronics Europe' with email 'europe@urbanelectronics.com', currency Euro (EUR), and address 10 Oxford Street, London, W1D 1BS, United Kingdom. Assign the Sony WH-1000XM5 Wireless Headphones, Samsung Galaxy S24 Ultra, and Logitech MX Master 3S to this new store while ensuring they remain available in the US store.
